creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-07-25 22:55:15 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt             Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-mgmt/p5-MRTG-Parse Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This perl extension enables its users to parse and utilize the
  logfiles that are generated by the famous MRTG (Multi Router Traffic
  Grapher) tool.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/MRTG-Parse/
  
  PR:             ports/125879
  Submitted by:   gslin <gslin at host-1.pixnet.tw>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.163     +1 -0      ports/net-mgmt/Makefile
  1.1       +22 -0     ports/net-mgmt/p5-MRTG-Parse/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net-mgmt/p5-MRTG-Parse/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/net-mgmt/p5-MRTG-Parse/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/net-mgmt/p5-MRTG-Parse/pkg-plist (new)
